headlines.title: Democrat Xavier Becerra advances to general election in California governor’s race
headlines.description: Former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Becerra has advanced to the general election in the California governor’s race, NBC News projects

headlines.title: ‘Maine had my back’: Graham Platner hits the campaign trail amid latest turmoil
headlines.description: Hundreds of supporters signaled they weren’t phased by the new allegations about Graham Platner’s past relationships, giving the Democratic Senate candidate a warm welcome on Friday.

headlines.title: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon is increasingly concerned about Israel ramping up its spying on the U.S., recently raising the counterintelligence threat level from America’s top ally in the Middle East to the highest level, according to two U.S. officials and one former U.S. official

headlines.title: Graham Platner supporter Ro Khanna says he should apologize to women who alleged disturbing behavior
headlines.description: BAR HARBOR, Maine — Rep. Ro Khanna of California on Friday said that Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner should apologize to the women who recently came forward describing disturbing behavior they experienced with him

headlines.title: Democrat Xavier Becerra advances to California governor general election, NBC News projects
headlines.description: Former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Beccera will advance to the general election in the race for governor in California, NBC News projects. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz discuss the latest election results and what impacts the speed of vote counting in the state.

headlines.title: Exclusive interview with President Trump
headlines.description: Meet the Press moderator Kristen Welker spoke to President Trump about Iran during an exclusive interview. It comes as the president is touting the economy during a push for the midterms in Wisconsin. NBC News' Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: ‘I’m not going to defend someone with that kind of history’: Rep. Dingell on Graham Platner
headlines.description: Rep. Debbie Dingell (D-Mich.) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the latest legislation passed by the House, including the Iran War Powers resolution and aid for Ukraine. Rep. Dingell also reacts to the latest controversy surrounding Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: DOJ office says ‘multiple’ probes of California elections underway after Trump cries foul
headlines.description: A federal prosecutor indicated the investigations are focused on the Los Angeles area following President Donald Trump’s claims, without evidence, of cheating in the primaries.

headlines.title: U.S. warns Europe to step up Ebola screening ahead of World Cup
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Trump administration is urging European countries to mirror U.S. travel restrictions implemented in response to Ebola as the U.S. prepares to host the largest-ever World Cup amid growing concerns about the spread of the disease, according to a State Department cable reviewed by NBC News

headlines.title: Janet Mills shows no sign of reigniting her Maine Senate bid amid Graham Platner’s troubles
headlines.description: Some of Maine Gov. Janet Mills’ most ardent supporters are encouraging her to reactivate her suspended Senate campaign as fellow Democrat Graham Platner faces new allegations of “toxic” behavior toward three ex-girlfriends, which he has denied

headlines.title: DOJ urges judge not to block $1.8B fund that it says is already dead
headlines.description: A federal judge last week temporarily blocked the $1.8 billion fund from being used after a Jan. 6 prosecutor sued to block the Trump administration’s actions.
